Skip to contents
transclust 0.0.1
  • Get started
  • Reference

Package index

Transmission cluster detection algorithms

A collection of algorithms for detecting transmission clusters in epidemiological data.

get_tn_clusters_snp_thresh()
Perform clustering of isolates using a hard SNP distance cutoff.
get_tn_clusters_sv_index()
Identify transmission clusters based on the number of shared variants.

Rcpp helper functions

A collection of helper functions used internally by get_tn_clusters_sv_index() written in Rcpp for performance.

computeSharedMatrix()
Compute the shared variant matrix
computeDefiningVariants()
Compute the defining variants for each subtree

Visualization

A collection of functions for visualizing results generated by this package.

plot_clusters_phylo()
Maps clusters onto a phylogenetic tree and visualizes them
compare_clusters()
Compares the content of clusters created with two different methods.
cluster_genetic_context()
Produces summary plots regarding genetic distances within and between transmission clusters.

Statistics

A collection of functions for statistical analysis of results generated by this package.

intra_cluster_genetic_var_analysis()
Analyze Intra-Cluster Genetic Variation

Utilities

A collection of utility functions for this package.

get_snp_dist_matrix()
Get SNP distance matrix from DNA alignment constructed using a model of DNA evolution.
get_phylo_tree()
Get phylogenetic tree using neighbor-joining or maximum parsimony method.

On this page
